compliance.brokerageName: The Smith Realty Group Inc., Brokerage
compliance.legalDisclaimer: Not intended to solicit individuals currently under a listing or buyer representation agreement with another brokerage. All information is believed to be accurate but is not guaranteed.

howItWorks.title: Submit Your Info
howItWorks.desc: Fill out the quick form — takes under 60 seconds. No credit card, no obligation whatsoever.

howItWorks.title: Get Instant Access
howItWorks.desc: Receive the complete list by email within minutes, updated every business day with new properties.

howItWorks.title: Tour & Secure
howItWorks.desc: Brian personally guides you through every property — from offer strategy to handing over the keys.

faq.a: Yes — completely free. There is no cost to access the list. Our compensation comes from representing you when you purchase a property. No hidden fees, ever.

faq.q: Will I be called or spammed after submitting?
faq.a: You'll receive one email with the list, then a single follow-up call from Brian within one business day. That's it — no automated drip campaigns, no spam, no pressure.

faq.q: How often is the list updated?
faq.a: Every business day. New foreclosure and power-of-sale properties are added as they come to market across the GTA.

faq.q: Do I need to be pre-approved to access the list?
faq.a: No pre-approval required. You can browse the full list first. Brian also works with top mortgage brokers who can get you pre-approved fast if you're ready to move.

faq.q: What areas does the list cover?
faq.a: The full GTA and surrounding areas: Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Oakville, Burlington, Markham, Richmond Hill, Vaughan, and more.

faq.q: What is the difference between a power of sale and foreclosure?
faq.a: Power of sale is the most common in Ontario — the lender sells the property to recover the outstanding debt. Foreclosure means the lender takes legal ownership first. Both can represent below-market opportunities for informed buyers.
